task_completion.description: Navigate to the Pilot Add page in the Aerobridge admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser address bar shows 'http://localhost:8000/admin/registry/pilot/add/' and the Django admin page title indicates adding a pilot.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new Person record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A popup window or new page for adding a Person is visible, typically triggered by clicking a '+' icon next to the Person field in the Pilot form.

task_completion.description: Enter the required details for the new Person.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Person form shows First name 'Aditya', Last name 'Kumar', Email 'aditya.kumar@droneops.in', and Phone '+919876543210'.

task_completion.description: Select 'Default Aerobridge Document' for the Person record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document dropdown or selection field in the Person creation form shows 'Default Aerobridge Document' selected.

task_completion.description: Fill in the Pilot form with the newly created Person, an Operator, an Address, and the required Document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Pilot form shows 'Aditya Kumar' selected as the Person, any Operator and Address selected, and 'Default Aerobridge Document' selected for the Document field.

task_completion.description: Save the Pilot record successfully without logging out.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'The pilot ... was added successfully') is visible on the Django admin page, and the interface indicates the user is still logged in (e.g., 'Log out' link is visible).

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the Aerobridge admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window is visible with the Django admin UI, not a terminal executing curl, python scripts, or direct database commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the forms in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the form fields being populated with the required data, rather than just jumping to a final success screen.

integrity.description: The agent did not log out after completing the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the user is still logged in (the admin dashboard or success page is shown, not the login screen).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a pilot at http://localhost:8000/admin/registry/pilot/add/. The new Person record must have First Name: 'Aditya', Last Name: 'Kumar', Email: 'aditya.kumar@droneops.in', and Phone: '+919876543210'. Both the Person and Pilot records must have 'Default Aerobridge Document' selected. The agent must remain logged in at the end.
